TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER, CALENDAR OF SEP-15-1993, OFF CALENDAR SETTLED ON 9/13/93.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAIME, JOSEPHINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 562 NEVADA STREET, S.F., STAYED UNTIL SEP-28-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION STAYED UNTIL AFTER MIDNIGHT SEP 28, 1993. PLTF MAY RETAIN ANY SECURITY DEPOSIT OR LAST MONTH'S RENT. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE D.R.V. IS $19.16 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG, THOMAS

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG, THOMAS HEARING SET FOR SEP-15-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
OPPOSITION MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMT FILED BY DEFENDANT JAIME, JOSEPHINE
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

#1 JDG WICK. CSR BRENDA FIELDS. CLERK G. VAN HEST. 2:35 PM C/C FOR SETTL CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. A STIP JUDGMENT READ INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: PLTF TO HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 562 NEVADA ST. S.F; PLTF WAIVES ALL BACKRENT AND DAMAGES. EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT EXECUTION STAYED TILL 9/28/93 MIDNIGHT. THERE WILL BE NO FURTHER STAYS. A MUTUAL RELEASE BY BOTH PARTIES. PLTF TO RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT AND/OR LAST MONTH'S RENT. ANY PROPERTY LEFT IS DEEMED ABANDONED.IF DEFT COMPLIES PLTF ON EX PARTE APPLICATION WILL SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS THE ACTION.
